name: powershell
description: Run a PowerShell command, import a script with -i, or execute a script with -s.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

mode.description: Optional file mode: -i to import a PowerShell script as a module, or -s to execute a script file.

script_path.description: Script path required when mode is -i or -s. The module also searches the release Scripts directory.

command.description: PowerShell command text for direct execution.
